race.comment: LOOK HERE (12) comes through stronger racing where she has been far from disgraced after sitting on speed. Expect Boudvillain to burn across from the wide alley and prove hard to reel in. INSPIRITU (11) was a sharp improver here in her second start when chasing gamely into the placings, in what has proved a red-hot form reference. Has been kept fresh with 35 days in between and is expected to be very competitive. ROY KELTON (5) has tackled the line nicely in his first two runs and gets a chance to settle closer this time. McDougall's booking is a positive and he's among the key chances. TOSEN FURY (7) is an improving type and gets a key booking in Loy. Have to keep safe.
